text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the first day of training for the Japanese
Oaks, I hand Nishino Flower her new training
regimen.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? This one is completely different...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There's more stamina training, and the sessions
are longer.
choice_data_list: It's to prepare you for the 2,400 meters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Oaks is 800 meters longer than the
Oka Sho. It'll take a lot of hard training to
increase her endurance.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I see... If I don't work really hard, I won't be able
to finish the entire race...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Whatever training I need to do, I'll do my
best!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to show you some great results in the
Japanese Oaks too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower is working as hard as she can to
improve. In order to support her as her trainer,
there's one thing I must make sure of.
choice_data_list:
You have to tell me if things become too much
to handle, okay?

You have to tell me if things become too much
to handle, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Puff...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes... I-I'm fine... I just... need a break...
choice_data_list:
(This is taking a greater toll on her than I
thought...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When running 2,400 meters, Nishino Flower's
unable to use her greatest weapon: her
fleet-footed speed. Maybe this distance is too
much for her after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since it's her wish to run in the Japanese Oaks, we
continue training every day, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Confusion detected. What is the matter, Flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(This is Mihono Bourbon. I really couldn't ask for
a kinder roommate.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... It's my weight... H-hold on a second.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I knew it. It's much lower than usual.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... I think this scale's calibration is off.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Perhaps you should try another scale. I would
test this one myself, but I am afraid it might
break.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe my weight dropped so much and so
quickly. I'm definitely eating enough...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You have been training very hard recently. It may
be that this weight loss is the result of your body's
inability to handle the burden.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Yeah, I kind of figured as much...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Should I stay quiet about it? Trainer will just
worry... I mean, I'm already having problems
because of my size...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If I say anything, I might have to stop training,
even though the race is just around the corner...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I can't even run properly in training yet. There's so
much effort I can still put in.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This is difficult to judge on an emotional basis.
However, logically speaking, if you continue to
overwork yourself, you may become unable to run
at all.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I believe your best recourse is to
report this to your trainer immediately and
prioritize maintenance.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. If I don't say anything, I'll just
cause Trainer even more trouble.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Does this mean you will report your situation
accordingly?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, I will. Thanks for your advice, Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So that's what's going on. Trainer, I...
choice_data_list: I'll put a rest period into your schedule.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay. I'm sorry...
choice_data_list:
No need to apologize. Once you're rested,
you'll be ready to go again.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You think so? I really hope you're right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With how intense her training is, I thought this
might happen, so I made sure to plan ahead, just
in case. But the thing that bothers me most is...
choice_data_list: Thank you for letting me know.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Honestly, I wasn't sure if I was going to. It's
probably not a big deal, and I didn't want to
worry you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But Bourbon gave me the push I needed. I'm glad
I told you now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fact she hesitated to tell me. I need to
become a trainer she feels comfortable relying
on, or I'll never be able to fully support her.
choice_data_list: (I have to show her how dependable I can be!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer? If I'm on break now, then does that
mean...
choice_data_list: Yes, we won't be training today.
Yes, we won't be training today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Is there anything I can do besides training,
then?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The race is coming up, so I'd like to do whatever I
can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she feels responsible for canceling our
training session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The best thing she can do now is to relax and get
her weight back up. And in order for her to
complete those two tasks...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: U-um, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I can't do that!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I can cook my own meals! I'll do my best on that
front, so please—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, this miso-grilled mackerel looks really good...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ack! I didn't mean to say that out loud! Trainer,
stooop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm at it, I also order a lot of side dishes
and desserts I think she would like.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm stuffed...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It was delicious... I haven't taken the time to sit
down and enjoy so many of my favorites in a
while.
choice_data_list: Why don't we go get some tea now?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Can we really? But aren't you busy?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ooh!
choice_data_list: They serve lovely tea cakes too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Tea cakes?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
U-um, I'd love to see what it's like! Please lead
the way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower seems more relaxed. It's great how
she's always so earnest, but I think I should
indulge her like this occasionally to keep the
stress at bay.
